---
title: "pcorr"
generated: true
description: "Alias for [`partialcorr`](../nitrix-stats-covariance/partialcorr.qmd)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.covariance`](../nitrix-stats-covariance.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:pcorr -->
```python
pcorr(*args, **kwargs) -> Num[Array, '... c c']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:pcorr -->
Alias for [`partialcorr`](../nitrix-stats-covariance/partialcorr.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:pcorr -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `*args` | `Any` | — | `()` | — |
| `**kwargs` | `Any` | — | `{}` | — |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `c` × `c`. Partial correlation matrix, `(..., c, c)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:pcorr -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
